name: hebbian-v2
hypothesis: Removing the MAX_DELTA cap (set to 20.0) allows the Hebbian weight update to encode co-activation magnitude rather than just co-presence — pairs with 65 shared sessions should get ~19.5x more weight than pairs with 2 sessions
eval_verdict: The uncapped Hebbian update encodes genuine magnitude signal in at least one case (Codex ↔ config.toml) but produces a saturated clique at the top that obscures rather than differentiates the strongest associations.
